title: ProvenanceReceipt
description: Protocol-owned provenance receipt family linking an artifact to the producing principal, source artifacts, and related audit evidence.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for provenance receipts.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this provenance receipt.

artifact_digest.description: Digest reference for the artifact whose provenance this receipt attests to.

producer.description: Principal identity for the component or actor that produced the artifact.

source_artifact_hashes.description: Hashes of source artifacts used to derive this artifact. An empty array is valid for root artifacts.

items.description: Hash of one source artifact used to derive the subject artifact.

produced_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp recording when the artifact was produced.

producing_audit_event_hash.description: Hash of the audit event that recorded the artifact production, when available.

producing_audit_receipt_hash.description: Hash of the audit receipt that attests to the recorded artifact production, when available.

signatures.description: Detached signatures attesting to the provenance receipt contents.

items.description: Detached signature block for the provenance receipt payload.
